title: ContentType
description: A content type definition including schema and metadata.

uid.description: Unique identifier of the content type.

title.description: Display name of the content type.

schema.description: Array of field definitions for the content type.

options.description: Configuration options for the content type such as versioning and workflow settings.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the content type was created.

updated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the content type was last updated.
